sections.a_eyebrow: Data Intensive · Charts · Websocket · Advanced JS · Professional
sections.a_description: The distinctive visual language of Real-Time Data UI — combining data intensive, charts, websocket elements to create interfaces that are immediately recognizable and purposefully designed. Every color, font choice, and spacing decision works together to evoke the specific mood and cultural context that defines this aesthetic, from the primary accent color to the carefully chosen typography.

This style finds its natural home across websites and applications that value data intensive and charts design principles. You'll see it on creative portfolios, brand microsites, specialized platforms, and digital experiences where the visual language itself communicates as powerfully as the content — proving that the right aesthetic choice can transform a standard layout into a memorable experience.

a_image_cover.alt: Real-Time Data UI style use case illustration
Real-Time Data UI style use case illustration
Real-Time Data UI style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The distinctive visual aesthetic of Real-Time Data UI — a design approach that creates unique, memorable interfaces. Background: dark (#0a0f0a). The .inner panel has a slightly lighter background with subtle border treatment and appropriate border-radius. Colors: #22c55e as the primary accent for interactive elements and highlights. #d0f0d0 for headings, #70a070 for body text. The aesthetic captures the essence of real-time data ui through careful color choices, spacing, and visual weight. Set in JetBrains Mono — chosen for its visual character that complements this design style. Heading at weight 600-700, 24-28px, line-height 1.2-1.3. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2-3px letter-spacing, color #22c55e. Body at weight 400, 14-15px, line-height 1.6-1.7, color #70a070. Buttons: primary — #22c55e background with contrasting text. Secondary: transparent with #22c55e border. Alternatives: system-ui (universal fallback), sans-serif stack.
